summary: Backend: 18/18 pytest tests pass (auth register/login/me, default categories seeding of 8, transactions CRUD + filters search/type/category, budget upsert+get with spent/percent, analytics summary with totals/month_totals/pie/bar[7]/insights). Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): splash -> onboarding (4-slide carousel with Skip/Continue) -> /login works. Login with pre-registered user routes to dashboard showing Balance/Income/Expense and Smart tips. FAB opens /add-transaction, category grid filters by Expense/Income, Save creates txn, dashboard updates (Balance -₹250, insight 'You spent most on Food'). Budget screen: budget-input + save-budget-button set ₹15,000, progress '2% used of ₹15,000 · ₹14,750 left this month'. Analytics: pie legend (Food ₹250), 7-day bar labels Sat-Fri, Insights card. Profile -> logout-button returns to /login. All critical testIDs present and functional.

issues: Slide illustrations/images not visible — only text + Skip/Continue/dots render; confirm intended design (illustration area appears blank in viewport).

react_native_issues.issue: Warning: 'useNativeDriver is not supported on web, falling back to JS-based animation'. Harmless on web preview, expected on native.
Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' -> use boxShadow, 'textShadow*' -> use textShadow. Non-blocking; cosmetic cleanup.

action_items: Optional: verify onboarding slide illustrations are rendering as intended (text present, visual area appears empty).
Optional: migrate deprecated RN Web style props (shadow*/textShadow*) to boxShadow/textShadow to clean console.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] together with allow_credentials=True — browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origin. Current frontend uses Bearer tokens (AsyncStorage), so this works today, but tighten origins before enabling cookie-based auth.
Default ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES=10080 (7 days) is long; acceptable for mobile but document.
get_current_user uses ObjectId(payload['sub']) without try/except — a malformed sub would 500 instead of 401. Low risk as tokens are self-signed, but consider guarding.
analytics_summary pie 'category' is stored as free-text name on txn, so renaming a category won't cascade. Acceptable for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway user per test run (uuid-suffixed email) via /api/auth/register; UI flow created one more user + sample expense and ₹15,000 budget. No static seed required. test@nsiap.com / test1234 NOT pre-created — must be signed up first per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://smooth-spend.preview.emergentagent.com. All 18 tests in /app/backend/tests/test_nsiap_api.py pass. Frontend flow requires tapping through 4 onboarding slides before reaching /login on first visit (persisted via AsyncStorage thereafter). Key testIDs verified: login-submit-button, signup-submit-button (signup screen not tested — use API register), tab-index/analytics/budget/profile, add-transaction-fab, save-transaction-button, budget-input, save-budget-button, logout-button. Category selection required before Save on add-transaction screen.
